exactness_policy: The benchmark file supplies the known-distance label; this script verifies only that the inverse sequence solves the generated state and that its length matches the label. Rows therefore carry status='external_label_exact' with exactness_basis='third_party_benchmark_label' instead of plain 'exact': only the replay is verified locally, optimality is the third-party label.
